  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing lockable disconnect switch within sight of the motor controller and motor location, creating an immediate safety hazard for maintenance personnel."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the motor circuit at the upstream distribution panel immediately.",
    "Lock out and tag out the upstream breaker.",
    "Install a code-compliant, lockable safety disconnect switch in-line with the motor circuit within line of sight of the motor."
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of a lockable disconnect switch for a motor circuit violates fundamental safety and electrical code requirements. Under NEC Article 430, a disconnecting means must be provided within sight of the motor controller and the motor location, and it must be capable of being locked in the open position to protect workers during maintenance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430.102",
    "NEC Article 430.109"
  ]
}
